data.name: California Swingers Club - Season 1: Sea Swap
data.detailed_description:
⚓ Embark on a romantic voyage with "Sea Swap ⛵💑" – a captivating visual novel inspired by an intriguing story. Two couples rent a spacious sailboat for the perfect vacation, but as they venture out onto the water, their journey takes an unexpected turn.

🌊 Navigate the challenges of the open sea, where love and relationships are tested against the backdrop of breathtaking sunsets and hidden islands.

💔 Discover secrets, make critical decisions, and witness the bonds of love and friendship evolve in the face of unforeseen adventures.

🌴 Unravel the twists and turns of a narrative that blends romance and suspense on the high seas.

🎭 Shape the destinies of these couples through your choices as you sail into a world of love, surprises, and unforgettable moments.

Features
- HD renders
- Intriguing story
- Explicit scenes
- Can be played with one hand

data.short_description: Two couples rent a spacious sailboat for the perfect vacation, but as they venture out onto the water, their journey takes an unexpected turn.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 6500
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 6500
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version 10.11+
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
